# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y nginx python3 python3-pip postgresql postgresql-contrib redis-server && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Web server setup
RUN echo "daemon off;" >> /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
COPY ./web /var/www/html
RUN ln -sf /dev/stdout /var/log/nginx/access.log && \
    ln -sf /dev/stderr /var/log/nginx/error.log

# API server setup
WORKDIR /api
COPY ./api .
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt

# Database setup
USER postgres
RUN /etc/init.d/postgresql start && \
    psql --command "CREATE USER devuser WITH SUPERUSER PASSWORD 'devpassword';" && \
    createdb -O devuser devdb
USER root

# Redis setup
RUN sed -i 's/^# requirepass .*/requirepass redispassword/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

# Expose ports
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

# Start all services
CMD service postgresql start && \
    service redis-server start && \
    service nginx start && \
    python3 api_server.py & \
    tail -f /dev/null
